summary: Iteration 25: P&L Math Bug Fix Verification - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Watchlist page correctly displays honest P&L (-7.87L when value 292L < capital 300L). Critical bug fix verified: P&L now calculated against original capital, not shrunken invested amount.
passed_tests: GET /api/portfolios/overview returns total_pnl = total_value - total_capital (honest basis)
Honesty invariant: total_value (292L) < total_capital (300L) → total_pnl is negative (-7.87L)
Aggregation invariant: sum of per-portfolio P&L == aggregate P&L (within ₹5)
Per-portfolio P&L uses capital basis (value - capital)
GET /api/portfolios/xirr/{strategy_type} returns capital field and uses capital basis for P&L
XIRR endpoint tested for all 6 strategy types: bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, long_term, swing, value_stocks, alpha_generator
Custom portfolio value invariant: current_value = holdings_value + cash_balance
Frontend Watchlist page displays Total Capital: 300L
Frontend Watchlist page displays Current Value: 292.1L
Frontend Watchlist page displays Total P&L: -7.87L (CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED)
Frontend shows all 6 AI portfolios with individual values
Frontend shows custom portfolio 'My Growth Picks' with +2.81% return
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 AI portfolios and 1 custom portfolio
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified the critical P&L math bug fix. The user-reported issue was: Capital 300L, Value 275L, but P&L shown as +10L (mathematically impossible). Root cause: P&L was calculated against 'actual_invested' (shrunken by stop-outs) instead of immutable 'initial_capital'. Fix verified across: (1) /api/portfolios/overview - aggregate and per-portfolio P&L uses capital basis, (2) /api/portfolios/xirr/{type} - includes capital field, P&L = value - capital, (3) /api/portfolios/analytics - total_pnl = total_value - total_capital, (4) /api/custom-portfolios/{id} - total_pnl = current_value - capital, (5) SafeJSONResponse sanitizes NaN/Inf to null. Frontend Watchlist page at /watchlist shows honest numbers: Capital 300L, Value 292.1L, P&L -7.87L, Return -2.62%. All 6 AI portfolios displayed with individual values. The 3 portfolios with historical stop-outs (Bespoke, Quick Entry, Value Stocks) now correctly show losses against original 50L capital each.
